scenarios.name: Stripe webhook deduplication via data store
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for external Postgres/Redis; treatment uses the built-in data_store prop, this.db.get/set, and $.flow.exit exactly as the skill documents.

scenarios.name: HTTP endpoint with signature validation
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reverts to an Express server; treatment reads steps.trigger.event and uses $.respond + $.flow.exit for short-circuit responses per the skill.
